commercialRule: Same Supabase email/password opens the same Inventra cloud workspace on any laptop; app data syncs automatically.
releaseNotes: Added commercial Supabase Auth sign-in/session storage for same email/password on all laptops.
Added automatic workspace resolution for the signed-in Supabase user.
Added automatic startup, focus, online, polling, and save-triggered Supabase sync.
Uploads local data to cloud when cloud is empty and pulls cloud data when a new laptop is empty.
Protects against empty-cloud overwrites with local protection backups before applying cloud state.
Syncs products, suppliers, batches, movements, orders, stock counts, users, roles, settings, kits, and hashed app credentials.
Raw passwords and Supabase tokens are not uploaded into workspace state.
Includes Supabase SQL schema/RPC file for workspace state, backups, sync events, and security events.
No SQL is run automatically by the patch installer; run the SQL once in Supabase SQL Editor.
